title: Data Sharing Docs Source Metadata Batch 5
content_html:
Batch 5: Durable Docs and Closeout

This is the delivery specification for Batch 5 in Data Sharing Docs Source Metadata Tasks.

Batch 5: Durable Docs and Closeout

Summary: Move final architecture decisions into durable docs, verify cleanup, and close the request.

ID status action
5.1 done Update Data Sharing docs to describe Data Sharing as a first-class canonical-data service that uses source-derived docs metadata rather than generated publication artifacts.
5.2 done Update Docs Viewer source/generated-data/data-model docs to distinguish generated publication artifacts from Data Sharing source metadata reads.
5.3 done Update Config Data Sharing Adapters and related adapter docs so fixtures and examples no longer describe public docs flat indexes or generated docs payloads as Data Sharing metadata sources.
5.4 done Cleanup confirmation: scan active Data Sharing service paths, tests, configs, and docs for stale dependency language or code paths that read public flat indexes, manage/local generated indexes, generated by-id payloads, search payloads, recently-added payloads, or generated metadata JSON for Data Sharing metadata.
5.5 done Record final verification commands, pass/fail results, generated payload status, and any manual checks that remain.
5.6 done Close this batch, the task tracker, and the parent request with final statuses, changed-path summary, durable decisions, remaining risks, and follow-on ownership.

Steer for these tasks

  • Durable docs should describe the final source-read contract, not the migration path.
  • Generated Docs Viewer payloads should not be rebuilt for this request.
  • Closeout should explicitly state that Data Sharing no longer depends on generated publication artifacts for docs metadata.

Deliverables

  • Updated durable Data Sharing and Docs Viewer docs.
  • Cleanup scan results.
  • Final verification log.
  • Closed tracker and parent request.

Implementation and policy guidance

  • Keep generated-data docs clear that generated artifacts are publication/site-surface outputs.
  • Keep Data Sharing docs clear that Data Sharing can share canonical-equivalent data externally and use returned data to update canonical docs source.
  • Do not introduce compatibility language that suggests generated artifact reads remain acceptable Data Sharing metadata sources.

Proposed verification set

  • git diff --check.
  • Focused stale-reference scans for generated publication artifact reads in active Data Sharing metadata paths.
  • Focused docs scans for obsolete public-index or generated-index dependency language.
  • Final focused pytest or smoke rerun only if Batch 5 changes executable code or if Batch 4 left a verification gap.

completed verification

  • 2026-06-05: Durable docs updated: Data Sharing, Analytics Data Sharing Technical Spec, Analytics Data Sharing Runtime, Documents Package Preparation Script, Data Sharing Adapters, Docs Viewer Generated Data Contracts, Source Organisation, Library Export Configs, Shared Patterns, Docs Data, and Scripts.
  • 2026-06-05: Active service/config stale-path scan passed: rg -n "docs_index|docs_payload_root|generated_docs_index|read_generated_docs_index|DOCS_SCOPES_ROOT|doc_payload_path|load_doc_payload|current_payload_missing|parent_payload_missing|metadata-index|tooling-index" docs-viewer/services/docs_data_sharing docs-viewer/services/docs_export.py docs-viewer/services/docs_import.py data-sharing/config/adapters.json studio/tests/python/test_data_sharing_adapters.py returned no matches.
  • 2026-06-05: Focused durable-doc scan passed with only intentional negative-contract matches and historical request/task records: rg -n "Data Sharing.*generated|generated.*Data Sharing|documents adapter.*generated|Library generated-docs index|generated Docs Viewer index|generated Docs Viewer data|generated Docs Viewer artifacts|assets/data/docs/scopes/<scope>/index\\.json|assets/data/docs/scopes/<scope>/by-id|docs_index|docs_payload_root|generated_docs_index|metadata-index|tooling-index" docs-viewer/source/studio data-sharing/config -g '*.md' -g '*.json'.
  • 2026-06-05: $HOME/miniconda3/bin/python3 -m pytest docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_data_sharing_source_metadata.py docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_export.py docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import.py docs-viewer/tests/python/test_docs_import_service.py studio/tests/python/test_data_sharing_adapters.py passed with 80 tests.
  • 2026-06-05: git diff --check passed.
  • No final browser/API smoke was run; Batch 5 changed durable docs and closeout state only.

follow-on tasks

  • No remaining follow-on tasks for this request.
  • Future document-backed Data Sharing domains should consume the Docs Viewer-owned source metadata helper or deliberately extend it based on concrete requirements; they should not add generated-publication artifact fallbacks.
  • No explicit generated docs write command was run in this request; local watcher-generated Studio docs/search payload changes exist after source docs edits.

task close

  • Batch 5 is complete. The task tracker and parent request are closed.
